title: biscutella auriculata f. mauritanica
intro: Biscutella auriculata f. mauritanica, also known as Mauritanian kidney vetch or balsam kidney vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Biscutella auriculata f. mauritanica include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating digestive problems and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically made from its leaves, flowers, and roots.
